Class GTNetMessageCodeRegistry

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.GTNetMessageCodeRegistry
@Component public class GTNetMessageCodeRegistry extends Object
Registry for GTNet message codes that supports both core and application-specific codes. This registry provides a unified lookup mechanism for message codes, allowing both the core library codes (GNetCoreMessageCode) and application-specific codes to be registered and retrieved by their byte value.

Usage

The core message codes are automatically registered during construction. Application-specific codes should be registered at startup via registerMessageCode(GTNetMessageCode).

Response Mapping

The registry also maintains a mapping from request codes to their valid response codes. This is used by the UI to show available response options for unanswered incoming requests.

    Constructors

    Description
    GTNetMessageCodeRegistry()
    Creates the registry and registers all core message codes.

  • Constructor Details

    • GTNetMessageCodeRegistry

      public GTNetMessageCodeRegistry()
      Creates the registry and registers all core message codes.

  • Method Details

    • registerMessageCode

      public void registerMessageCode(GTNetMessageCode code)
      Registers a message code in the registry.
      Parameters:
      code - the message code to register
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if a code with the same value is already registered

    • registerResponseMapping

      public void registerResponseMapping(GTNetMessageCode requestCode, GTNetMessageCode... responseCodes)
      Registers a request-to-response mapping.
      Parameters:
      requestCode - the request code (must be an _RR_ type)
      responseCodes - the valid response codes for this request

    • getByValue

      public GTNetMessageCode getByValue(byte value)
      Looks up a message code by its byte value.
      Parameters:
      value - the byte value to look up
      Returns:
      the corresponding GTNetMessageCode, or null if not found

    • getByName

      public GTNetMessageCode getByName(String name)
      Looks up a message code by its enum constant name.
      Parameters:
      name - the enum constant name to look up (e.g., "GT_NET_ADMIN_MESSAGE_SEL_C")
      Returns:
      the corresponding GTNetMessageCode, or null if not found

    • getValidResponses

      public List<GTNetMessageCode> getValidResponses(GTNetMessageCode requestCode)
      Returns the valid response codes for a given request code.
      Parameters:
      requestCode - the request message code (must be an _RR_ type)
      Returns:
      list of valid response codes, or empty list if not a request type

    • hasCode

      public boolean hasCode(byte value)
      Checks if a message code with the given value is registered.
      Parameters:
      value - the byte value to check
      Returns:
      true if a code with this value is registered

    • getAllCodes

      public Collection<GTNetMessageCode> getAllCodes()
      Returns all registered message codes.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable collection of all registered codes

    • getAllResponseMappings

      public Map<GTNetMessageCode, List<GTNetMessageCode>> getAllResponseMappings()
      Returns all registered response mappings.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map of request codes to their response codes
